title: Yet Another Bingo: BlazeandCave's Advancements
description: A tier list for "Yet Another Bingo", using BlazeandCave's Advancements as bingo goals!
body:
# Yet Another Bingo: BlazeandCave's Advancements

This is a bingo tier list + compatibility datapack for the [BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack), allowing you to play [Yet Another Bingo](https://modrinth.com/mod/yet-another-minecraft-bingo) with BlazeandCave's advancements as the goals!

![A pillager outpost surrounded by pillagers, all looking in confusion at a goat in a boat that is flying through the air](https://gitlab.com/horrific-tweaks/bingo-datapack-blazeandcaves/-/raw/main/banner.png)

<small>

Screenshot taken with [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)

</small>

To get started, install this datapack alongside BlazeandCave's Advancements. You should then see a "BlazeandCave's" option in the Tier List menu that you can select!

> Alternatively, use the `/bingo tierlist blazeandcaves` command to enable it or set a percentage!

Note that some of BlazeandCave's advancements are intentionally unclear with their descriptions. You may need to reference the [Advancement Documentation](https://bit.ly/bacap_1_17_doc) while playing if you get stuck :)

## Credits

This tier list was created by Kingswords! (uploaded by fennifith, with permission)
